name: Ball Park Style Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine egg whites and water. Mix well and set aside.
2. On a lightly floured surface, roll dough lengthwise into a 15 x 5-inch long rectangle.
3. Cut dough into 8 equal long strips.
4. Take one of the dough pieces and roll it into a 20-inch long rope.
5. Shape each rope into a "U" shape and place them on a lightly prepared baking sheet.
6. Take the right end of each rope and fold it over to the bottom left corner, creating a loop.
7. Brush the pretzels with egg white mixture and sprinkle with coarse salt.
8. Bake in a 375 degree Fahrenheit oven for 16 minutes or until golden brown.
